title: (Bullish Signal) ODFL, price moved above its 50-day Moving Average on February 02
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This price move could indicate a change in the trend, and may be a buy signal for investors. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor found 38 similar cases, and 31 were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 82%. Current price $200.54 crossed the support line at $198.92 and is trading between $205.38 resistance and $198.92 support lines. Throughout the month of 12/30/20 - 02/02/21, the price experienced a +6% Uptrend, while the week of 01/26/21 - 02/02/21 shows a -1% Downtrend.

https://preview.redd.it/jmojeqg6xaf61.png?width=1537&format=png&auto=webp&s=03682d02cac72bd090a872f3a808f2c77247e3e9

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator suggests the stock price trend may be in a reversal from a downward trend to an upward trend. 38 of 49 cases where ODFL's Stochastic Oscillator exited the oversold zone resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 78%.

ODFL moved above its 50-day Moving Average on February 02, 2021 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

Following a +5.45% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where ODFL advanced for three days, in 283 of 389 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 73%.

ODFL may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.
